title: Combine Place Values to Subtract
essential_question: How can you combine place values to subtract 3-digit numbers?

A=197: 십의 자리 과감산 오류 (off by 10)

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

learn.title: What Does 'Combine Place Values' Mean?
learn.content: Instead of regrouping one place at a time, you can COMBINE place values before subtracting. Example: 700 = 7 hundreds. You can think of it as 6 hundreds + 10 tens, or 6 hundreds + 9 tens + 10 ones. Then subtract!
learn.math_note: '자릿값 결합' 개념: 7H0T0O를 6H9T10O처럼 한 번에 재배분하면 0이 포함된 뺄셈을 한 단계로 처리 가능

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Example: 700 − 326
learn.content: Step 1: 700 = 6 hundreds + 9 tens + 10 ones (combine!). Step 2: Ones: 10−6=4. Step 3: Tens: 9−2=7. Step 4: Hundreds: 6−3=3. Answer: 374.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Why Combine?
learn.content: When you have zeros in the middle (like 700, 508, 900), combining makes it easier because you do all the regrouping in ONE step instead of going back and forth.
learn.math_note: 왜 결합하는가: 중간에 0이 있으면 연쇄 받아내림 대신 한 번에 결합하면 단계 절약

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Example: 476 − 269
learn.content: Ones: 6−9? Can't! Regroup: 476 = 4h 6t 16o. 16−9=7. Tens: 6−6=0. Hundreds: 4−2=2. Answer: 207.
learn.math_note: 476−269: 이중 받아내림 예시 — 일의 자리, 십의 자리 모두 받아내림 필요

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Example: 900 − 158
learn.content: 900 = 8 hundreds + 9 tens + 10 ones. Ones: 10−8=2. Tens: 9−5=4. Hundreds: 8−1=7. Answer: 742.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Estimate First!
learn.content: Always estimate before solving. 476−269: estimate 500−300=200. Your answer (207) is close. 700−326: estimate 700−300=400. Your answer (374) is close.
learn.math_note: 어림 먼저: 700−326 ≈ 700−300=400; 실제 374와 근접 → 합리적 범위 확인 습관

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 1 Lesson 11 p.47-49

procedure_source.name: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 2 Lesson 6 — combining place values to subtract across zeros using base-ten drawings and the standard algorithm

assessment_source.name: NCTM Progressions NBT K-5 — combine-place-value errors and borrow-chain omission in 3-digit subtraction across zeros

learn.title: Check by Adding
learn.content: After subtracting, add your answer to the smaller number. 374+326=700 ✓. 207+269=476 ✓. If they match, your subtraction is correct!

learn.math_talk_prompt: You just solved 700 − 326 = 374 using the combine strategy. Let's check: 374 + 326 = ?  Does your check give you 700? Now try checking 900 − 158 = 742: does 742 + 158 = 900? Why does adding your answer back to the number you subtracted always give the original number? Can you explain this to a partner using a number bond?

learn.title: Combining vs. Regular Regrouping
learn.content: Both methods give the same answer! Combining is just a shortcut for numbers with zeros. Use whichever method feels easier to you.
learn.math_note: 결합 vs 일반 받아내림: 두 방법 모두 동일 정답; 결합은 0이 있는 수에서 더 효율적인 지름길

practice_r2.question: Which subtraction shows the CORRECT way to combine place values for 600 − 247?
choices: C. Both A and B are correct
solution_steps: A steps through it; B combines in one step
practice_r2.hint: Try both methods — do they give the same result?

expected_errors.note: A: A 방법만 정답이라 오해 (단계별 처리만 유효하다고 생각)
B: B 방법만 정답이라 오해 (한 번에 결합만 유효하다고 생각)
D: 어떤 방법도 정답이 아니라 오해

practice_r2.math_note: 600−247 결합 방법: 5H9T10O; A·B 둘 다 동일 결과 → C(Both) 정답

practice_r3.question: A farmer harvested 806 apples Monday and 459 Tuesday. He sold all Monday's apples and 278 of Tuesday's. How many Tuesday apples are left?
practice_r3.hint: Monday's apples don't matter! Focus on Tuesday.

expected_errors.citation: Carpenter et al. (1998) p.15 — 'Stopping at an intermediate result is the most common error in two-step word problems at Grade 3; students often answer the implicit sub-question rather than the stated question.'
expected_errors.note: A=171: 월요일 806개를 계산에 포함 (관련 없는 정보를 문제에 투입 — 파악 실패)
C=191: 화요일 뺄셈 받아내림 오류 (+10 오차)

practice_r3.question: A library has 900 books. Fiction: 358. Non-fiction: 276. The rest are magazines. How many magazines?
practice_r3.hint: First add fiction + non-fiction, then subtract from 900.

expected_errors.citation: NCTM NBT Progressions p.11 — 'Even students who use correct decomposition strategies may revert to a digit-by-digit view when combining partial sums, omitting regrouping across the boundary.'
expected_errors.note: A=256: 900−634 결합 오류 (십의 자리 계산 off by 10)
C=276: 비소설 수(276)를 정답으로 오해 (뺄셈 미수행)

lesson_summary: 자릿값 결합 뺄셈 마스터: 0이 포함된 수(700, 900, 508 등)는 백·십·일의 자리를 한 번에 재배분(결합)하면 연쇄 받아내림을 한 단계로 처리 가능. 결합 공식: Xh 0t 0o → (X-1)h 9t 10o. 검산: 답 + 뺀 수 = 처음 수.
unit_intro_message: 이 단원에서는 1,000 이내의 덧셈·뺄셈을 배웁니다. 자릿값 결합 뺄셈의 핵심은 0이 있는 자리에서의 연속 받아내림을 '결합(combine)' 전략으로 한 번에 해결하는 것입니다 — 이 방법을 익히면 어떤 복잡한 3자리 뺄셈도 정확하게 풀 수 있습니다.
unit_close_message: 결합 전략은 0이 포함된 수에서 가장 강력합니다. 항상 '어림 먼저, 검산 마지막'으로 계산의 합리성을 확인하고, 답 + 뺀 수 = 처음 수가 성립하는지 반드시 검증하세요.
